title: Better Free AI Image than Midjourney?
summary: Jack Roberts claims Ideogram 4.0 excels at rendering text in AI-generated images, a weakness across the field. He reports the model beats Midjourney on certain leaderboards and Google's Nano Banana Pro on DesignArena, while being available for free.
writeup: Jack Roberts examines Ideogram 4.0, a free text-to-image model, with a focus on its ability to render legible text inside generated images, a persistent weak point across the field. He reports that the model outperforms Midjourney on certain leaderboards and beats Google's Nano Banana Pro on DesignArena. The central takeaway: a no-cost option claims top rankings on text rendering specifically, the area where image generators commonly fail.
